topics: Design a database schema for an application with ER diagram from a problem description
Creation of database schema using DDL (create tables, set constraints, enforce relationships, create indices, delete and modify tables) and export ER diagram to verify relationships
Database initialization - data insert and bulk data import using UI and SQL commands
Practice SQL DML commands for insertion, updating, altering, deletion, and conditional viewing/querying of records
Implementation of aggregate functions, Order By, Group By, and Having clause in SQL
Implementation of set operators, nested queries, and join queries
Practice of SQL TCL commands (Rollback, Commit, Savepoint) and DCL commands for granting and revoking user privileges
Practice of SQL commands for creation of views and assertions
Creation of procedures, triggers, and functions
Design of a database application using a front-end tool with five or more tables
Creation of NoSQL databases using MongoDB or Cassandra (domains such as eCommerce, Inventory, or Social Media)
